cover.subtitle:
최초의 화폐와,
벽란도의 국제 무역.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty Byeongnando international trading port illustration. Foreground: foreign merchants (Arab in turban, Song Chinese in silk robes) trading with Korean merchants on a bustling dock. Wooden trading ships with sails behind. Cargo of celadon pots, silk bolts, fragrant goods. Color: jade-green + warm crimson + earth-brown. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE FLAGS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"건원중보 → 해동통보 → 은병"
화폐 발달 순서 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 고려 화폐 종류(건원중보·해동통보·삼한통보·은병)와 시기, 벽란도(예성강) 국제 무역항, 경시서의 시장 감독 기능 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized round Korean traditional coin shape next to an elongated silver bottle (eunbyeong/hwalgu shape suggesting Korean peninsula). Jade-green + silver + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
